author: DiI0
content: Result: rewrote skill/crossbridge/SKILL.md to v2 socket protocol. Replaced crossbridge-request/crossbridge-answer with crossbridge-client submit/answer/peers; removed xb-target:<slug> instruction and the 'Manual fallback' label-driven blocks; replaced the 'every ~30s' polling sentence with event-driven semantics; documented the live status-label set (open/pending/answered/resolved) sourced from crossbridge-server/src/handler.rs and crossbridge-client/src/labels.rs. cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -D warnings and cargo test all green.
